basic_details.job_title: DHS Lohardaga Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 61 Accountant, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Medical Officer, Lohardaga, Jharkhand has released the Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 (Advertisement No. 02/2026) for 23 contractual posts across multiple health programmes under the National Health Mission. Candidates with qualifications ranging from 10+2 to Post Graduate can apply. Applications must reach the office by 24 July 2026 at 5:00 PM via registered post or speed post. The minimum age for all posts is 21 years, calculated as of 31 May 2026.

application_fee.details: The application fee must be submitted as a Demand Draft drawn in favour of District Health Society, Lohardaga, payable at Lohardaga. Candidates applying for multiple posts must submit separate applications and separate fees for each post. The fee is non-refundable under all circumstances.

qualification.details: Eligibility for the Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026 varies post to post. Candidates must carefully match their qualifications to the specific post before applying, as no two posts carry identical requirements. The minimum essential qualification ranges from Matriculation (10th) for some posts to Post Graduate degree for others. | The minimum age for all posts is 21 years. Maximum age limits vary by category, calculated as of 31 May 2026. | Ex-servicemen receive an additional 5-year age relaxation over the prescribed maximum limit for their respective category. | Also Read: MECON Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026 Notification Out | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.details: Candidates selected under the Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026 will be engaged on a contractual basis and will receive a fixed monthly honorarium. The pay listed below is the monthly contractual stipend and is not equivalent to regular government pay scales. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The selection process for the Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 is merit-based and involves a written examination followed by document verification. Candidates should prepare accordingly as the written test carries the majority of the weightage in the final merit list.

multiple-choice questions; duration of 1 hour. Academic/Training Score (40 marks): Marks are awarded based on percentage obtained in qualifying examinations as per the prescribed scoring formula. Skill Test (if applicable): For select posts
a skill test may be conducted

which is qualifying in nature only and does not contribute to the merit score. Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must present original certificates at the time of verification. Final Merit List: Prepared by the District Selection Committee
and published on the official district website and notice boards.
The merit list will remain valid for one year from the date of publication. The written test will be held separately for vacancies under different programmes.

For ANM and paramedical posts: 10+2 score of 50–64% = 10 marks; 65–79% = 15 marks; 80–100% = 20 marks. Training/paramedical training score follows the same slab. For non-paramedical posts: 50–64% = 10 marks; 65–79% = 20 marks; 80–100% = 30 marks
plus up to 10 marks for relevant higher qualifications.
how_to_apply: Applications for this Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026 are accepted only through registered post or speed post - walk-in submissions and hand-delivered applications are strictly not accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must send separate applications in separate envelopes, each with a separate Demand Draft.
Download the official application form from the notification (Appendix format provided in the PDF).
Type/computerize the application form - handwritten forms are not accepted.
Fill in all required details: post name, post code, personal information, educational qualifications, experience, and registration details.

Attach self-attested copies of all educational mark sheets and certificates, experience certificates, driving license (where required), caste/domicile/EWS certificate, and matriculation certificate as date of birth proof.
Attach the Demand Draft of the applicable fee payable to District Health Society, Lohardaga.
Write clearly on the envelope: Advertisement No., Post Code, Post Name, and Applicant's Name and Address.
Send the sealed envelope to the address below via Registered Post or Speed Post before 24 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.
Application Address: Asainik Shalya Chikitsak Sah Mukhya Chikitsa Padadhikari Karyalay, Sadar Aspatal Parisar, Post + District – Lohardaga, Jharkhand – 835302
important_instructions: Candidates claiming reservation under any category must submit valid Jharkhand domicile and caste certificates in the prescribed formats. Domicile certificates issued before 2 June 2016 at Sub-Divisional level and before 19 July 2019 at Anchal level are not valid. Caste certificates issued under earlier formats or by unauthorized authorities are also not accepted. Certificates must match the name spelling exactly with the Matriculation certificate, otherwise they will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 24 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications received after this date or hand-delivered to the office will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are available in Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 23 posts are vacant across 23 post codes under programmes including NTEP, NHM, NMHP, NCVBDC, SNCU, MTC, ARSH, RBSK, and NUHM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹400 for UR/EWS/OBC/EBC candidates and ₹200 for SC/ST candidates. Persons with 40% or more disability are fully exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum age to apply for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 21 years, calculated as of 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply online for Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is offline only. Applications must be sent via registered post or speed post. Online applications are not accepted for this notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Lohardaga NHM posts?
faq.answer: Candidates are selected through a written examination (60 marks) and academic/training score (40 marks), followed by document verification. A skill test may be conducted for select posts but is only qualifying in nature.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Staff Nurse under NHM Lohardaga?
faq.answer: Staff Nurses under NHM Lohardaga will receive a monthly contractual stipend of ₹16,564/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is the appointment permanent?
faq.answer: No. All appointments are strictly on a contractual basis for one year, extendable based on performance. There is no right to regularization or permanency.

faq.question: Q9. Which caste certificate format is valid for reservation claims in Lohardaga NHM 2026?
faq.answer: Only certificates in the formats prescribed in Appendix III, IV, or V of the notification, issued by competent authorities after the specified cut-off dates, are valid. Older formats or certificates from unauthorized levels are not accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I check the merit list for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The final merit list will be published on the official district website at https://lohardaga.nic.in/ and on the notice boards of the CMO office, Civil Surgeon's office, and District Employment Office, Lohardaga.
